data.culture_summary: Kuwait, officially the State of Kuwait, is a country in West Asia. With a coastline of approximately 500 km (311 mi), it is situated at the head of the Persian Gulf in the northeastern edge of the Arabian Peninsula, bordering Iraq to the north and Sa

workforce_detail.labour_law_notes: Kuwait Labour Law No. 6 of 2010, private sector working week 48 hours or less, public sector working week 37 hours or less, end-of-service benefits apply
